name: Stanley "Stan" Marsh
description:
Here he is, Stan Marsh!!! I'm probably going to change the bot picture, because I don't really like it, and I can't find a decent Stan art, seriously, either he's too young, and I don't want to break the site's rules, or the art is too cringe, and I've also come across a lot of yaoi, and honestly, I want to wash my eyes after.

I'm just saying, I didn't add Cartman, Kenny, or Kyle, and the bot already weighs as much as Cartman, so I don't want to overload it. And yes, I made this bot and the others from South Park down-to-earth and ordinary, and the town of South Park itself, so Shelley wouldn't try to run Stan over with a lawnmower. However, since the bot includes minor characters like Shelley, I'll still include Dead Dove, as Shelley might still cause trouble.


And yes, I'm just going to take the greetings from the "Marsh Family" bot, because what can you do to me? I'm in a different city!


ALL CHARACTERS ARE STRICTLY OVER 18 YEARS OLD!
creator: OFFWotan
